violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice cream machine noted not properly maintained. Also M&Ms and Oreo crumbs noted on the top of the machine between the two resovoirs present a potential allergen risk if these contaminants were to enter the machine.

HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Two different hand sinks in the kitchen were noted with hand towel dispensers not operating correctly. Both were reset/adjusted to properly dispense paper towels. It is recommended to find out the root cause of these malfunctions and either repair or replace the units.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage/recycling container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. Lid noted open.
